title: Conversation Confidence
description: Practice real English conversations — greetings, introductions, and your graduation assessment with Sofia.
description_sw: Fanya mazoezi ya mazungumzo ya kweli ya Kiingereza — salamu, utambulisho, na tathmini yako ya kuhitimu na Sofia.
sofia_intro: This is the final module! After this, you will be ready to talk to any recruiter. I will be your conversation partner.
sofia_intro_sw: Hii ni moduli ya mwisho! Baada ya hii, utakuwa tayari kuzungumza na mwajiri yeyote. Nitakuwa mwenzako wa mazungumzo.

lessons.title: Greetings & Introductions
lessons.sofia_hint: Practice these dialogues by clicking the play button, then try saying them yourself!
lessons.sofia_hint_sw: Fanya mazoezi ya mazungumzo haya kwa kubonyeza kitufe cha kucheza, kisha jaribu kuyasema mwenyewe!

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: Good morning. My name is James. I just joined the team.
lines.sw: Habari za asubuhi. Jina langu ni James. Nimeungana na timu tu.

lines.speaker: Sofia
lines.en: Good morning, James! Nice to meet you. I'm Sofia, the team lead.
lines.sw: Habari za asubuhi, James! Furaha kukutana nawe. Mimi ni Sofia, kiongozi wa timu.

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: Nice to meet you too. I am looking forward to working with everyone.
lines.sw: Furaha kukutana nawe pia. Ninasubiri kufanya kazi na kila mtu.

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: My name is James. I have three years of experience in customer service. I managed a team of five people and we improved customer satisfaction by 20%.
lines.sw: Jina langu ni James. Nina uzoefu wa miaka mitatu katika huduma za wateja. Nilisimamia timu ya watu watano na tuliongeza kuridhika kwa wateja kwa 20%.

lines.speaker: Sofia
lines.en: That's impressive! Why do you want this job?
lines.sw: Hiyo ni ya kuvutia! Kwa nini unataka kazi hii?

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: I want to grow my skills and contribute to a great team. I believe this company is the best place to do that.
lines.sw: Nataka kukuza ujuzi wangu na kuchangia timu nzuri. Ninaamini kampuni hii ni mahali pazuri zaidi pa kufanya hivyo.

lessons.title: Listening Comprehension
lessons.sofia_hint: Listen to each audio clip and answer the question about the main point.
lessons.sofia_hint_sw: Sikiliza kila klipsi ya sauti na ujibu swali kuhusu jambo kuu.

exercises.transcript: Our team meeting is at 9 AM in Conference Room B. Please bring your weekly report.
exercises.transcript_sw: Mkutano wa timu yetu uko saa tatu asubuhi katika Chumba cha Mkutano B. Tafadhali lete ripoti yako ya wiki.
exercises.question: What should you bring to the meeting?

exercises.transcript: The deadline for the project has been moved to next Friday. Please update your schedules.
exercises.transcript_sw: Muda wa mwisho wa mradi umesogezwa hadi Ijumaa ijayo. Tafadhali sasisha ratiba zenu.
exercises.question: What changed about the project?

exercises.transcript: Our client is very happy with the results. We improved their sales by 30% last quarter.
exercises.transcript_sw: Mteja wetu amefurahi sana na matokeo. Tuliongeza mauzo yao kwa 30% robo ya mwisho.
exercises.question: What was the improvement percentage?

lessons.title: Speaking Practice: Talk About Yourself
lessons.title_sw: Mazoezi ya Kusema: Zungumza Kuhusu Wewe
lessons.sofia_hint: Record yourself answering these questions. There are no wrong answers — just practice speaking!
lessons.sofia_hint_sw: Rekodi sauti yako ukijibu maswali haya. Hakuna majibu mabaya — mazoezi tu ya kuzungumza!

prompts.question: What is your name and where are you from?
prompts.question_sw: Jina lako ni nani na unatoka wapi?
prompts.sample_answer: My name is James. I am from Nairobi, Kenya.
prompts.sample_answer_sw: Jina langu ni James. Ninatoka Nairobi, Kenya.

prompts.question: What kind of work do you do or want to do?
prompts.question_sw: Unafanya kazi gani au unataka kufanya kazi gani?
prompts.sample_answer: I work in customer service. I want to become a team leader.
prompts.sample_answer_sw: Ninafanya kazi katika huduma za wateja. Nataka kuwa kiongozi wa timu.

prompts.question: Tell me about one achievement you are proud of.
prompts.sample_answer: I am proud that I managed to improve customer satisfaction scores by 20% in my last job.
prompts.sample_answer_sw: Ninajivunia kwamba niliweza kuongeza alama za kuridhika kwa wateja kwa 20% katika kazi yangu ya mwisho.

lessons.title: Module 4 Final Assessment
lessons.sofia_hint: Score 80% to complete Foundation and earn your GRADUATION! You are almost a Candidate.
lessons.sofia_hint_sw: Pata 80% kukamilisha Foundation na kupata KUHITIMU KWAKO! Uko karibu kuwa Mgombea.

questions.prompt: What is the correct way to greet someone in a professional setting in the morning?
questions.prompt_sw: Njia sahihi ya kumsalimia mtu asubuhi katika mazingira ya kitaaluma ni ipi?

questions.prompt: Someone asks: 'Tell me about yourself.' Which is the BEST professional answer?
questions.prompt_sw: Mtu anauliza: 'Nieleze kuhusu wewe.' Jibu BORA la kitaaluma ni lipi?
options: I am a very nice person.
My name is James. I have three years of customer service experience and led a team of five.
I like football and I am from Nairobi.
I want a job because I need money.

questions.prompt: You hear: 'The deadline is next Friday.' What does this mean?
questions.prompt_sw: Unasikia: 'The deadline is next Friday.' Hii inamaanisha nini?
options: The work must be completed by Friday.

questions.prompt: Which sentence introduces your achievement BEST?
questions.prompt_sw: Sentensi ipi inawasilisha mafanikio yako VIZURI ZAIDI?
options: I did things that were good.
I improved sales by 25% in my last position.
Sales were better when I was there.

questions.prompt: Your manager says 'Please coordinate with the team.' What should you do?
questions.prompt_sw: Meneja wako anasema 'Please coordinate with the team.' Unapaswa kufanya nini?
options: Wait for someone to talk to you.
Work together and communicate with your team members.
Write a long email to the manager.
